narrative:
Huber Heights 4-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,152 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
